name: Hamil 55-62" Floor Lamp - FLL4103 - Gold - Safavieh
description:
Introducing the Hamil extendable floor lamp, a striking addition to any living space. Ranging from 55 to 62 inches in height, this lamp blends elegance with practicality, making it a perfect fit for various room sizes. Crafted from durable metal, the Hamil lamp showcases a stunning brass gold finish, adding a touch of sophistication to your decor.

The lamp's minimalist design is complemented by its functionality, allowing for easy adjustment to suit your lighting needs. Whether placed in a living room corner or beside a cozy reading nook, its radiant gold hue will illuminate your space beautifully. The sturdy iron construction ensures it stands elegantly and securely.

Elevate your home's ambiance with the Hamil floor lamp, where style meets functionality. Its timeless design and luminous gold color create a warm and inviting atmosphere, enhancing any interior with a modern touch. Light up your life with this versatile and chic floor lamp.
